Definition: The authentication is coming from a server that is designed to hide, or anonymize the actual source IP address
Indicators confirmed to host malicious content, has functioned as a command and-control (C2) server, and/or otherwise acted as a source of malicious activity.
Indicators confirmed to host malicious content due to compromise or abuse. The exact time and length of compromise is unknown unless disclosed within the report.
Indicators likely related to an attack but potentially only partially confirmed. Detailed by one or more methods, like passive DNS, geo-location, and connectivity detection.
Indicators representing an entity that has been confirmed to have been victimized by malicious activity, where actors have attempted or succeeded to compromise.
